video_info.title: UEFA Champions League 2025-26
video_info.shortDescription: Real Madrid host Manchester City in the UEFA Champions League Round of 16, promising another chapter in their modern rivalry. The Bernabeu sets the stage for two European heavyweights battling for supremacy. Fans can expect high drama, tactical brilliance, and star power on full display. Can the hosts take advantage of their home ground or will the visitors spoil the party? Catch all the action from UEFA Champions League 2025-26, LIVE & exclusively on Sony LIV.

video_info.episodeTitle: Real Madrid vs Man City - Round Of 16 - Leg 1 - 12 Mar 2026

video_info.title: UEFA Champions League 2025-26
video_info.shortDescription: Paris Saint-Germain take on Chelsea in this thrilling 1st Leg fixture of the UEFA Champions League Round of 16 encounter. PSG, with their attacking depth and home advantage, will look to dictate the tempo, while Chelsea’s resurgence under Liam Rosenior adds intrigue to the contest. The clash promises intensity, tactical battles, and the potential for a surprise outcome that could shape the rest of the tournament. Catch all the action from UEFA Champions League 2025-26, LIVE & exclusively on Sony LIV.

video_info.title: UEFA Champions League 2025-26
video_info.shortDescription: Bodø/Glimt hosts Sporting CP in the first leg of the UEFA Champions League round of 16 at Aspmyra Stadion. This clash pits the Norwegian champions' high-scoring attack against Sporting's unbeaten away form in Europe. Catch all the action from UEFA Champions League 2025-26, LIVE & exclusively on Sony LIV.

video_info.title: Sitaare Zameen Par
video_info.shortDescription: After a DUI, an arrogant basketball coach must train neurodivergent adults for community service. His initial prejudice fades as his players show him a new perspective on life.
